Follow `AGENTS.md` in the repository root first.

This repository defines a reusable sysadmin/network-admin template and meta-system. Do not treat it like an application repo and do not introduce live instance/runtime data into it.

When changing canonical policy or structure, keep the following aligned in the same change:

- canonical docs
- schemas
- templates
- adapter generation
- validation/tests

If a future task pivots into another repo, follow that target repo's local instruction files first.
